---
name: README bilingual sync
description: Keep README.zh-CN.md and README.en.md consistent when updating project docs.
---

# README bilingual sync

## Purpose
Maintain `README.zh-CN.md` and `README.en.md` with equivalent structure and content.

## Rules
1. Update both files in the same PR when README content changes.
2. Keep section order aligned between Chinese and English versions.
3. Ensure both files contain language switch links:
   - `[中文](README.zh-CN.md)`
   - `[English](README.en.md)`
4. Keep package lists and command examples semantically equivalent.
